author.name: Joel
author.bio: Daily market notes from the Ploop dev desk.

posts.text:
Welcome to Ploop Stonks 📈

I'll post quick daily thoughts here — macro, positions, and whatever I'm watching. Not financial advice, just a dev building an app and trading on the side.
SPY holding above the 200-day MA. Watching for a clean pullback before adding. Patience > FOMO.
